name: Tata Neu Plus SBI Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under Tata Neu Plus SBI Card terms
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee reversal on annual spends of Rs 1 lakh or more
4 complimentary domestic lounge accesses per year, 1 per quarter, subject to Rs 50,000 spend in previous quarter
additionalBenefits: 499 NeuCoins as welcome benefit on realization of joining fee
2% value back as NeuCoins on Tata Neu App/Website and partner Tata Brands
Extra 5% value back as NeuCoins on select category spends on Tata Neu App/Website
1% value back as NeuCoins on other spends including eligible UPI transactions on RuPay variant
UPI NeuCoins capped at 500 NeuCoins per statement cycle
NeuCoins are posted to the cardholder's NeuPass account
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions from Rs 500 to Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 250 per statement cycle
